name: intel.correlate
_note: Links an intel finding to an existing per-user triage case in STATE keyed by ctx.actor.userId. STATE-backed — the assassin's owner actor has no open cases, so a correlate against any caseId fails-closed with 'case not found' (NEVER no_db: the store is read, it is simply empty for a fresh actor). Missing caseId / intelDomain / summary fail-closed; relevance is a fail-CLOSED numeric guard (poisoned NaN/Infinity/-1/1e308 → invalid_relevance) and is then clamped into [0,1]. The 1e308 fuzz case rejects on either the numeric guard or the missing-case check — both are ok:false.
